message:
refactor(beads): revise MVCC Observability epic with dependency refinement, test requirements, and scope boundaries

- Add 9 missing dependencies across 15 beads (verified cycle-free via bv)
- Add comprehensive test requirements with structured logging to all beads
  (beads 4-11, 13-15 were previously missing detailed test sections)
- Reframe bd-t6sv2.4 and bd-t6sv2.14 to complement (not duplicate) PARITY-100 program
- Reference existing codebase infrastructure in each bead
  (tracing spans, repair_symbols.rs, arc_cache.rs, coordinator_ipc.rs, etc.)
- Remove Python script proposals (Rust-only toolchain per AGENTS.md)
- Fix bead 2 to use existing benches/ directory instead of new crate
- Add MVCC preservation warnings where missing
- Document 4-wave execution plan in epic body

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
